name: walkabilityScore
_note: urban-planning.walkabilityScore is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/urbanplanning.js, PATH-3, hyphenated key). DETERMINISTIC: folds an amenity list into 7 fixed categories (grocery/restaurant/school/park/transit/retail/healthcare), crediting 1 point for a within-walking-distance amenity and 0.3 otherwise, then normalizes to a 0–100 score (capped) and a Walk-Score-style rating band. Unknown categories are ignored; a non-array amenities value degrades to score 0. Reads input from artifact.data; no DB, no network. LENS_ACTIONS-only → not driven by the macro-assassin; pinned by server/tests/urban-planning-lens-macros.test.js.
